summary:
Delivered technical support and maintained detailed documentation for enterprise clients.
- Managed high-volume support queues, ensuring meticulous documentation and accurate data entry within various ticketing systems for each distinct client.
- Delivered technical support for enterprise clients across highly regulated sectors, including healthcare, legal, and finance (e.g., Vail Health, Crowell & Moring, Navitus).
- Routinely updated and maintained knowledge bases, ensuring all client information was organized and easily retrievable.

Mentored students with technical guidance and constructive feedback to foster a collaborative learning environment.
- Engaged with students in after-lecture labs, providing technical support and answering questions to enhance their learning.
- Critiqued students' work to foster a collaborative and growth-oriented environment.
- Supplied valuable resources, offering guidance on relevant tools and materials.

Collaborated across disciplines to manage art tasks and translate artistic visions into visual mediums.
- Worked alongside writers and producers to create unique designs to translate artistic vision into a visual medium.
- Managed priority and assignment of art tasks.
- Collaborated with artists to achieve appropriate visual style.
